---
title: "CosMx Tonsil strucutres - Differences"
author: "Samuel Gunz"
date:  last-modified
format: 
    html:
      toc: true
      self-contained: true
      highlight-style: github
      code-line-numbers: true
---
# Setup

```{r}
#| message: false
#| echo: false
library("SpatialExperiment")
library("sosta")
library("ggplot2")
library("tidyr")
library("dplyr")
library("sf")
library("smoothr")
library("spdep")
library("ggspavis")

theme_set(theme_bw())
```

Read in data

```{r}
spe <- readRDS("~/data_no_backup/CosMx_TVA/110.rds")
spe <- toSpatialExperiment(spe, spatialCoordsNames = c("CenterX_global_px", "CenterY_global_px"))

# selected fov of interest
ls <- c(105, 106, 107, 108, 109, 110, 111, 133, 134, 135, 136, 137, 138, 139, 96, 97, 98, 25, 26, 27, 28, 29, 30, 382, 383, 384, 46, 47, 48, 49, 50, 51, 52, 59, 60, 61, 62, 63, 64, 65, 92, 93, 94, 95)

gc()
```


```{r}
#| fig-width: 5
#| fig-height: 9

cbind(spatialCoords(spe), colData(spe)) |>
  as.data.frame() |> 
  dplyr::filter(fil == TRUE) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = CenterX_global_px, y = CenterY_global_px, color = typ)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.15, stroke = 0) + 
  coord_equal() +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size=4))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = unname(pals::okabe(8)[-1]))
```



```{r}
cbind(spatialCoords(spe), colData(spe)) |>
  as.data.frame() |> 
  filter(fov %in% ls) |> 
  filter(fov < 300) |> 
  dplyr::filter(fil == TRUE) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = CenterX_global_px, y = CenterY_global_px, color = fov)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.5, stroke = 0) + 
  coord_equal() 
```
```{r}
#| fig-width: 5
#| fig-height: 9
cbind(spatialCoords(spe), colData(spe)) |>
  as.data.frame() |> 
  dplyr::filter(fil == TRUE) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = CenterX_global_px, y = CenterY_global_px, color = lv1)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.15, stroke = 0) + 
  coord_equal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("navy", "gold", "firebrick")) +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size=3)))
```

# Structures per ROI

```{r}
spe$typ |> unique()
```


```{r}


int <- shapeIntensityImage(
  spe[,!is.na(spe$typ)],
  marks = "lv1",
  imageCol = "typ",
  imageId = c("110_TVA2"),
  markSelect = "epi"
)

int

ppp <- SPE2ppp(spe, marks = "lv1",
  imageCol = "typ",
  imageId = c("110_TVA1"))
plot(ppp)

res <- .intensityImage(ppp, markSelect, bndw, dim)
```


```{r}
params <- estimateReconstructionParametersSPE(
    spe,
    marks = "lv1",
    imageCol = "typ",
    markSelect = "epi",
    plotHist = TRUE
)
```


```{r}
mean(params$thres)
mean(params$bndw)
```

```{r}
res <- reconstructShapeDensityImage(
    spe,
    marks = "lv1",
    imageCol = "fov",
    imageId = ls,
    markSelect = "epi",
    bndw = 50,
    thres = 8.5E-5,
    dim = 750
)
```


```{r}
cs1 <- grDevices::colorRampPalette(pals::alphabet(26))(dim(res)[1])

res |>
    mutate(struct = (cs1)) |>
    ggplot() +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = struct, color = struct)) +
    guides(color = "none", fill = "none") +
    scale_color_manual(values = cs1) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cs1) +
    theme_void()
```


```{r}
#| column: screen
#| out-width: 100%
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-heigth: 8 
spe |>
  (\(x) x[, colData(x)$fov %in% ls])() |>
  (\(x) cbind(spatialCoords(x), colData(x)))() |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  ggplot(aes(x = CenterX_global_px, y = CenterY_global_px, color = lv1)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.5, stroke = 0) +
  coord_equal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("steelblue", "lightgoldenrod", "orchid")) +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3))) +
  geom_sf(
    data = res,
    fill = NA,
    color = "black",
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    # this is important
    linewidth = 0.25
  )
```
